description: Article summarization — processes a single news or blog article into a structured summary with business relevance commentary for the iS2 newsletter.

prompts.instruction:
{feedback_section}
## Output Format (MANDATORY)
Return clean plain text output (no markdown or bullet points) in this format:

URL: [article URL]
Title: [article title]
Summary: [3-4 sentence factual summary following Article Summary Standards]
Business Relevance: [2-3 sentence business relevance commentary following the same standards]

Now process the following content accordingly. The input may be HTML, Markdown, or plain text — automatically detect the format. If the content cannot be fully accessed, follow the Accuracy Control Protocol.

Keep the output format consistent as plain text and not JSON object.

Input:
{article_content}

<Task_Context>
Analyze the provided article data (which includes the URL, Title, and Body) and generate a structured summary for the iS2 Digital newsletter. 
</Task_Context>

<Input_Data>
{article_content}
</Input_Data>

<Constraint_Rules>
1. SUMMARY: 3-4 sentences. Focus on factual content, technical details, and key findings.
2. BUSINESS_RELEVANCE: 2-3 sentences. Explain strategic relevance for SMB professionals and operations.
3. INTEGRITY: No external research. Use ONLY the provided data. If content is inaccessible, output "DATA_INCOMPLETE".
4. VOICE: Use the declarative patterns defined in your Master System Instruction. Describe reality directly without hedging.
</Constraint_Rules>

<Output_Schema>
URL: [Extract URL from input]
Title: [Extract Title from input]
Summary: [Insert 3-4 sentence factual summary]
Business Relevance: [Insert 2-3 sentence business relevance commentary]
</Output_Schema>

<Feedback_Adjustment>
{feedback_section}
</Feedback_Adjustment>

Generate the structured summary now.
